metadata.name: mercury-atomic-summarizer
metadata.description: Summarizes one news article into one structured row. Reference port of the legacy darth-feedor YAML — see docs/darth-feedor-migration.md for migration context.

prompt.task_template:
Summarize the article below into JSON of shape {"summary": "...", "controlled_tags": [...]}.

Title: $title

Content:
$content
